meta.title: AI Auto-Diagnostic — Hoptisens
meta.description: Discover in 2 minutes the most impactful AI projects for your business.

intro.title: Which AI project will have the most impact on your business?
intro.subtitle: Answer 5 questions. Our AI analyzes your context and proposes concrete automation projects, with their architecture and complexity level.
intro.disclaimer: No personal data required. Immediate results.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself.
profile.context: This information helps us target the most relevant automations for your role and industry.

tools.title: What tools do you use daily?
tools.subtitle: Select at least 1 tool.

painPoints.title: Which processes take up most of your time?
painPoints.subtitle: Select 1 to 4 pain points, then indicate your #1 priority.
painPoints.descriptionLabel: Describe your biggest pain point in one sentence (optional)

maturity.title: Where are you with AI and automation?

Hero.description: Hoptisens designs and deploys custom AI systems for SMEs: automation, intelligent agents, connected CRM. Your margins are protected, your time is freed.

Offres.title: Our solutions for your growth
Offres.subtitle: From customer acquisition to process automation, each offer meets a concrete need for your SME.

acquisition.title: Acquisition & Prospects
acquisition.description: Your sales team spends more time looking for prospects than closing deals. We automate everything up to the CRM.

automation.title: Automation & RPA
automation.description: Double data entry destroys your profitability. Your flows execute in real time, without human error.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: A virtual assistant trained on your data, available 24/7 for your clients or your teams.

sprint.title: AI Sprint
sprint.description: 10 days to prove it works. Free diagnostic, then proof of concept delivered.

workshop.title: Workshops & AI Training
workshop.description: From half a day to three days — practical workshops to identify your use cases and leave with a PoC

Sprint.title: 10 days for your first ROI
Sprint.subtitle: A two-step process to technically and financially validate your transition to AI.
Sprint.step1_desc: Fill out our targeted questionnaire. Our AI analyzes your real data to assess feasibility and your potential ROI.
Sprint.step2_title: Step 2 - The Immersive Sprint (Proof of Concept)
Sprint.step2_desc: For 4 business days, we map your data in immersion and deliver a billed proof of concept.
Sprint.guarantee_desc: Step 1 filters out unfeasible ideas to save you time. Step 2 legally and technically secures your investments.

Chiffres.title: What our clients already measure
Chiffres.subtitle: Averages observed on our recent SME support.

metrics.2: Days for a quantified first ROI
metrics.3: of the audit deductible from the mission

Contact.title: Start your AI project
Contact.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll analyze your needs within 24h.
Contact.response_time: Our team typically responds within 24 to 48 business hours to schedule a 30-minute discovery call.

About.title: Our Purpose
About.subtitle: Democratize Artificial Intelligence for SMEs. We believe AI shouldn't be reserved for tech giants. By 2030, every structured company should have its own AI ecosystem to multiply its productivity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: Create a world where humans are freed from repetitive tasks to focus on creativity, thanks to ethical and high-performing AI.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Support leaders in their transformation by identifying, sourcing and integrating the best AI solutions applicable today.

strategy.title: Our Strategy
strategy.desc: Link pragmatism and innovation. Quickly deploy PoCs with direct ROI (AI Sprint) before structuring complex global systems.

About.founder_role: AI Agents Orchestrator · Hoptisens Founder · Music enthusiast
About.founder_bio: Engineer turned Business Developer, Hadrien spent 7 years running a 60-consultant IT Business Unit within a major consulting firm — learning on the job how to structure, sell and grow a complex services business.
About.founder_philosophy: In 2024, he founded Hoptisens with a conviction: AI must serve operations, not impress investors. His philosophy sums up in three words: Simplify to Amplify.
About.founder_quote: Engineer in mindset, Business Developer in practice. I focus on identifying problems and enjoy imagining solutions to address them.
About.approach_subtitle: A proven methodology in 3 major steps, guaranteeing integration and sustainable adoption of new tools.

1.title: 1. Diagnostic
1.desc: We dive into your operations to map your processes. Our team identifies bottlenecks and evaluates AI use cases offering the best feasibility/ROI trade-off.

2.title: 2. Construction
2.desc: Based on the action plan validated together, our engineers develop the complete solution: AI model choice, automation flow design and interface creation if needed.

3.title: 3. Transfer & Training
3.desc: A technical solution is useless without adoption. We train your operational teams to master their new tool, and document the system to ensure scalability.

LeadsPage.title: Fill your prospect pipeline, automatically.
LeadsPage.subtitle: We build custom prospecting systems combining ethical scraping, AI qualification and multi-channel outreach.

1.title: Augmented Prospector
1.desc: Real-time monitoring of the web, LinkedIn and public databases to identify your targets as soon as a business signal appears.

2.title: AI Filter
2.desc: An AI agent analyzes each prospect to ensure it perfectly matches your Persona, automatically rejecting false positives.

3.title: Connected Campaigns
3.desc: Automated push of qualified prospects to your CRM and triggering of personalized email sequences via AI (unique Icebreakers).

Calculateur.title: Calculate your ROI with AI Agents
Calculateur.subtitle: Discover how much time and money you could save with our automation solutions.
Calculateur.subtitle_2: Select the solutions that match your needs to see your potential savings.

results.title: Your ROI estimate
results.cta: Book a call to get your detailed analysis
results.note: Estimations based on average SME scenarios. Final ROI depends on your specific context.

CookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies to ensure proper operation and improve your experience. No advertising cookies are used.
